description: The LineEmitter component is used with particle systems (see Photon Dust) to create particles from a straight 3d line made from two points.

fields.Point0: Point 1 of the line for this Emitter drawn between two points.
fields.Point1: Point 2 of the line for this Emitter drawn between two points.
fields.Color0: The starting Color multiplier for particles emitted from this Emitter when being emitted nearest to ``Point0``.
fields.Color1: The starting Color multiplier for particles emitted from this Emitter when being emitted nearest to ``Point1``.
fields.DirectionMode: How to handle the direction when emitting particles from the line.
fields.Direction0: The direction particles should go when being emitted nearest to ``Point0``.
fields.Direction1: The direction particles should go when being emitted nearest to ``Point1``.
fields.UpDirection: The direction that should be considered up for this line.
